---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new command, flag, or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What workflow is currently hard or unsupported?

## Proposed change

Describe the command, flag, output, or docs change you want.

## Why it matters

Who benefits, and what becomes easier?

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or alternate designs you considered.
